violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the restroom was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1) Shelving - checkout area (rodent droppings) 2) Ceiling tiles (previous water damage) New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026
Observed missing ceiling tiles in retail area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
The condensate from the walk-in cooler was observed in a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

The floor in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris and was observed with soiled towels on the floor. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025
The floors in the walk-in cooler observed with soiled towels on the floors. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2023
